name: AppCensus
description: Mobile app privacy analysis platform auditing SDK data collection behaviors for privacy and security compliance.

seo.title: AppCensus — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: AppCensus: Mobile app privacy analysis platform auditing SDK data collection behaviors for privacy and security compliance.

when_to_use: Auditing third-party SDKs for undisclosed data collection behaviors
Validating privacy compliance before App Store submission or MDM rollout
Identifying SDK data leakage risks for GDPR/CCPA compliance review
Assessing data broker activity in mobile ad SDKs for enterprise procurement

pros: Audits real SDK behavior, not just privacy policies
Surfaces data leaks and PII collection in apps
Useful for legal, security and compliance teams
Independent of ad networks so less conflict of interest
cons: Not an attribution platform despite the category
Niche use case limits day-to-day marketing value
Smaller team and slower product cadence
review.verdict: Excellent SDK privacy auditor, but misplaced under attribution — treat it as a compliance tool instead.
review.best_for: Privacy, legal and security teams auditing third-party SDKs for compliance risk.
review.not_for: Growth teams looking for install attribution or MMP replacement.
